title: APIExpose event envelope
description: Envelope broadcast by APIExpose on every WebSocket stream (ws://host:12345/ws and /ws/<stream>). Property names are PascalCase on the wire; SDK clients normalize them.

Type.description: Dot-separated event type. The prefix routes the event to a stream: ui.* -> frontend, score.live.* -> score, timer.live.* -> timer, retroachievements.* -> retroachievements, arcade./mame./fbneo./outputs.* -> arcade, panel./theme.* -> panel, ingame./retroarch./wrapper.* -> ingame, marquee.* -> marquee, topper.* -> topper, instruction-card.* -> instruction-card, screen.* -> screen, hiscore.* -> hiscore, media.* -> media, roms./rom-pack./romset.* -> roms, startup./health./version./hub./config./maintenance./rules./notifications.* -> system, commands./intent./es-control.* -> control, esevent.* -> esevent (only).

NodeId.description: Identifier of the emitting node (multi-cabinet setups).

Payload.description: Event-specific payload. May be null. Shapes vary per Type; see the wiki Events page.
